title: Quadlet system test
body:
This adds some initial quadlet system tests. This contains only tests for regular .container and .volume files. I will let @ygalblum add kube tests later.

```release-note
None
```

Why is this not triggering the running of the tests?

> Why is this not triggering the running of the tests?

Sometimes CI is down for unknown reasons, force pushing helps most of the times.
@vrothberg Can you kick the CI here?

Done!

/hold

We need to wait for @edsantiago 's head nod before merging.  I will review soon.
Ok, new version, this time without sleep. I had to reimplement systemd-notify, and i found a (known) race condition in journal/systemd, but now it seems ok.

I am going to merge, because @edsantiago might be out through the holidays.  We can fix any issues he has when he gets back. This way we have quadlet testing for the next few weeks.

/lgtm
@rhatdan @vrothberg @alexlarsson there is still a hold label on this PR, so it wasn't merged. Since the changes here break my PR, It'd be great to merge this one so I can rebase and have a clean PR
